use_cases: Standard interactive button for form submissions and CTAs
Reusable button with multiple style variants
Accessible button with focus states and keyboard support
Icon buttons for toolbar and navigation actions
Themeable button component via CVA variants
ai_summary: A reusable React Button component with Radix UI Slot integration for composition. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant handling, includes focus-visible states, disabled states, and full accessibility support via Radix primitives.
